titleStmt.title: SII 19.266: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 266. (A.R. No. 398 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḶUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, SUNDARĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 96 sheep and a lamp-stand for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Pagaiviḍai-Īśvaragrihattu-Mahādēvar Paḻuvūr-Nakkar at Mannu-Perumpaḻuvūr in Kuṉṟa-kūṟṟam, by Āttirayaṉ Śivadāsaṉ Śōḻappirāṉ alias Uttamaśōḻa-Brahmādarāyar of Pūvaṉūr in Veṇṇik-kūṟṟam. Probably an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa. In the same place is found an unfinished piece of a record of the 4th year of Parākēsarivarman ‘who took the head of the Pāṇḍya’ (Aditya II).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu maṉṉuperum paḻuvūr pakaiviṭai Īśvaragṛhattu mādeva
r paḻuvūrnakkarkku veṇṇikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam pūvaṉūr Āttirayaṉ śivadāsaṉ coḻappirāṉṉāṉa Uttamacoḻabrahmātarāyar cantrā
tittavaṟ niṟkka vaicca Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟu ceruviṭaiyāl niṉṟa nāṉūṟṟu
palam panmāhe
śvararakṣai .—
svasti śrī . pāṇṭiyaṉait talaikoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu kuṉṟak kūṟṟattu maṉṉup perumpaḻuvūr pakaiviṭai Ī
Digital edition of SII 19.266 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
